retry_reason: Failure indicates the object's refcount is zero and it is being freed/dying; retrying will not revive the object.
contract_summary: Conditional get-wrapper: acquires a reference on a cached_dev object only if its reference count is non-zero (object is still alive). Returns true on success, false if the object is already dead/dying. On success, the caller owns an additional reference and must eventually call a corresponding put function (e.g., cached_dev_put) to release it. The embedded memory barrier ensures proper ordering with the attach operation. This is not a creation or set wrapper — it assumes the object already exists and merely increments its refcount in a safe manner.
